source.sqlReaderQuery: select * from openquery(AE_Redshift_PROD, 'select count(*) as fp_count from ae_dwh.ucd_faculty_rpt_t where project_number like ''FP%''')

message.value: @concat('ALERT: FP Projects count in ae_dwh.ucd_faculty_rpt_t is critically low! Current count: ', string(activity('Count FP Projects').output.firstRow.fp_count), '. Expected at least 40,000. The AE Data Warehouse may be missing Faculty Portfolio project data.')

source.sqlReaderQuery: SELECT ISNULL(MAX(AsOfDate), '1900-01-01') AS LastAsOfDate FROM dbo.EmployeeAccrualBalances

select * from openquery(AE_Redshift_PROD, '
  SELECT
      project_number AS ProjectNumber,
      COALESCE(task_num, '''') AS TaskNum,
      COALESCE(fund_cd, '''') AS FundCode,
      COALESCE(program_cd, '''') AS ProgramCode,
      COALESCE(activity_cd, '''') AS ActivityCode,
      COALESCE(expenditure_category_name, '''') AS ExpenditureCategoryName,
      COALESCE(prj_owning_cd, '''') AS ProjectOwningOrgCode,
      award_number AS AwardNumber,
      award_name AS AwardName,
      award_type AS AwardType,
      award_start_date AS AwardStartDate,
      award_end_date AS AwardEndDate,
      award_status AS AwardStatus,
      project_name AS ProjectName,
      prj_owning_desc AS ProjectOwningOrg,
      project_type AS ProjectType,
      project_status_code AS ProjectStatus,
      task_name AS TaskName,
      task_status AS TaskStatus,
      pm AS Pm,
      pa AS Pa,
      pi AS Pi,
      copi AS Copi,
      fund_desc AS FundDesc,
      purpose_cd AS PurposeCode,
      purpose_desc AS PurposeDesc,
      program_desc AS ProgramDesc,
      activity_desc AS ActivityDesc,
      cat_budget AS PpmBudget,
      cat_commitments AS PpmCommitments,
      cat_itd_exp AS PpmExpenses,
      cat_bud_bal AS PpmBudBal,
      load_dt AS LoadDate
  FROM ae_dwh.ucd_faculty_rpt_t
  where cat_budget is not null
 ')
